description_long: This is a modern single-story bungalow with a flat roof and a minimalist rectangular footprint, set on a green lawn. The exterior features a combination of light gray stonework and white plaster, with large windows on the main facade and a prominent glass door entryway. A small stone pathway leads to the entrance, and a wooden pergola provides partial shade over the front patio area. The rear and one side of the bungalow are more solid, with fewer windows and a clean, unadorned wall. The roof appears to be accessible and flat, possibly usable as a terrace or for utilities. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a blend of natural and modern materials.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, stone and white plaster exterior, large windows, and a shaded front patio.
description_view_0: Side view showing the main entrance with glass doors, stonework, and a small patio area.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the large windows, pergola, and landscaped entry path.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with a mostly solid white wall and minimal window openings.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying a wide stone facade with grouped windows and a small back step.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped front and rear windows
